Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kristina F. Almquist of MORGAN LEWIS & BOCKIUS (415-442-1000), appearing for defendant / moving party FDCC California, Inc.
Chris Hersom of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Shirley Crawford

RULING:
DEFENDANT GRINNELL LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Grinnell LLC's demurrer to plaintiff's first amended complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to give plaintiff the opportunity, if she is able to do so, to demonstrate that her claim against defendant is not barred by the statute of limitations. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
